state_summary.assessment: Strong attention but no purchase conversion at the stated price.
state_summary.interpretation: The bottleneck appears to be at the pricing or commitment step rather than initial interest.

recommended_next_experiment.name: pricing_and_commitment_sensitivity_test
recommended_next_experiment.goal: Determine whether lower price or lower commitment unlocks paid conversion.
design: Use a similar audience and similar messaging to control for awareness effects.
Test a lower-friction offer such as an early-bird preorder, refundable deposit, or discounted founding-customer price.
Prefer comparing two price or offer variants if feasible.
Use paid commitment as the primary success metric instead of clicks.

decision_rule.if_positive: If preorders or deposits appear, price or commitment friction was likely the main blocker.
decision_rule.if_negative: If conversion remains zero, revisit the value proposition or target segment before scaling attention efforts.
